narrative:
Beaver Village (precinct in Pike County) has 228 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a clear Republican lean of 10.5 percentage points.
